iteration1.notes: Dedup failed: model used md5sum (not available on macOS)

iteration2.notes: Added md5 -r instructions for macOS. Both pass.

iteration3_confirmation.notes: Dedup inconsistent: model got hashes but entered infinite grep loop instead of reporting results

iteration4.notes: Provided single-command dedup pipeline. Messy failed: zsh glob errors when no files match a pattern (e.g. *.jpeg) cause entire mv command to fail

iteration5.notes: Replaced glob mv with for-loop + case statement. Both tasks pass consistently.

changes: Compressed 434-line verbose skill to ~40 lines of direct instructions
Added macOS-specific commands: md5 -q instead of md5sum
Provided single-command awk pipeline for duplicate detection to avoid multi-step reasoning loops
Replaced glob-based mv commands with for-loop + case statement to avoid zsh 'no matches found' errors
Added explicit warnings against common failure modes (md5sum, grep on file contents)
